description_long: This doll features a stylized, cartoonish appearance with a large, round head and exaggerated facial features, including wide red eyes and a small mouth. It wears a long, flowing white robe with gold trim and a red sash, giving it a ceremonial or traditional look. The doll's hair is black, voluminous, and sculpted into dramatic, curled shapes that frame its face. A large, woven straw hat sits atop its head, extending far behind and above, with a subtle red band visible at the back. The back of the robe displays a circular emblem with a hand motif, adding a unique decorative element. The doll's arms are outstretched to the sides, and its hands are small and pale, matching the face.
description: A stylized doll with a large straw hat, dramatic black hair, wide red eyes, and a flowing white robe with gold trim and a hand emblem on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's wide red eyes, curled black hair, and the full detail of the white robe with gold trim and red sash.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large straw hat's profile and the hand emblem on the back of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full expanse of the straw hat and the circular hand motif on the robe's back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hat's depth and the robe's side profile.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional ceremonial robe in white with gold trim and a red sash, featuring a circular hand emblem on the back; complemented by a large woven straw hat.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, head facing forward, legs together and straight, torso upright and static.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open red eyes and a small, closed mouth; no visible eyebrows or strong emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, voluminous black hair styled in dramatic, curled shapes framing the face.
